list.name: dbname
list.label: Database
list.query:
SELECT value, label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT dbname AS value, dbname AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY value;

list.name: instance
list.label: Instance
list.query:
SELECT value, label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT instance AS value, instance AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY value;

list.name: start_snap
list.label: Start Snap
list.query:
SELECT label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;

list.name: end_snap
list.label: End Snap
list.query:
SELECT label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;

options.content: ⬅ Return to Navigation  |  , 🔄 Reset Filters

targets.rawSql:
WITH top_ts AS (
  SELECT tablespace
  FROM awr_tablespace_io_stats
  WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''
    AND dbname = '$dbname'
    AND instance = '$instance'
    AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
  GROUP BY tablespace
  ORDER BY SUM(reads) DESC
  LIMIT 10
)
SELECT
  t.snap_time AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata' AS "time",
  t.tablespace,
  t.reads::numeric AS reads_ops
FROM awr_tablespace_io_stats t
JOIN top_ts x ON x.tablespace = t.tablespace
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''
  AND t.dbname = '$dbname'
  AND t.instance = '$instance'
  AND t.begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
ORDER BY "time";

WITH top_ts AS (
  SELECT tablespace
  FROM awr_tablespace_io_stats
  WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''
    AND dbname = '$dbname'
    AND instance = '$instance'
    AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
  GROUP BY tablespace
  ORDER BY SUM(writes) DESC
  LIMIT 10
)
SELECT
  t.snap_time AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata' AS "time",
  t.tablespace,
  t.writes::numeric AS writes_ops
FROM awr_tablespace_io_stats t
JOIN top_ts x ON x.tablespace = t.tablespace
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''
  AND t.dbname = '$dbname'
  AND t.instance = '$instance'
  AND t.begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
ORDER BY "time";

SELECT tablespace AS metric, avg_read_ms
FROM awr_tablespace_io_stats
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''
  AND dbname = '$dbname'
  AND instance = '$instance'
  AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
ORDER BY avg_read_ms DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT tablespace AS metric, write_avg_ms AS avg_write_ms
FROM awr_tablespace_io_stats
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''
  AND dbname = '$dbname'
  AND instance = '$instance'
  AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
ORDER BY avg_write_ms DESC
LIMIT 10;
